# Transcrição: 0. Introduction

## [00:00 - 00:25]

What you're going to find here is a hit list of why sales people fail and why they fail in the close and exactly how you can avoid making sure you never make those mistakes. After this course, you'll know what not to do and you'll know more importantly what to do with every client you have. This will become your lifeline to closing more deals and making more money.
